'''mohangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wealy|wealy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wealy|wealy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mohangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohangithi|mohangithi]] || [[word:mohangiji|mohangiji]] || [[word:mohangishi|mohangishi]] || [[word:mohangiki|mohangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohanguthuthu|mohanguthuthu]] || [[word:mohangujuju|mohangujuju]] || [[word:mohangushushu|mohangushushu]] || [[word:mohangukuku|mohangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohanguthu|mohanguthu]] || [[word:mohanguju|mohanguju]] || [[word:mohangushu|mohangushu]] || [[word:mohanguku|mohanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohangufthuf|mohangufthuf]] || [[word:mohangufjuf|mohangufjuf]] || [[word:mohangufshuf|mohangufshuf]] || [[word:mohangufkuf|mohangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohangethe|mohangethe]] || [[word:mohangeje|mohangeje]] || [[word:mohangeshe|mohangeshe]] || [[word:mohangeke|mohangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohangothotho|mohangothotho]] || [[word:mohangojojo|mohangojojo]] || [[word:mohangoshosho|mohangoshosho]] || [[word:mohangokoko|mohangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohangotho|mohangotho]] || [[word:mohangojo|mohangojo]] || [[word:mohangosho|mohangosho]] || [[word:mohangoko|mohangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohangofthof|mohangofthof]] || [[word:mohangofjof|mohangofjof]] || [[word:mohangofshof|mohangofshof]] || [[word:mohangofkof|mohangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfthĂŻf|mohangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfjĂŻf|mohangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfshĂŻf|mohangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfkĂŻf|mohangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|mohangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|mohangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|mohangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|mohangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfthĂŻf|mohangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfjĂŻf|mohangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfshĂŻf|mohangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfkĂŻf|mohangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfthĂŻf|mohangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfjĂŻf|mohangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfshĂŻf|mohangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:mohangĂŻfkĂŻf|mohangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mohangĂŠthĂŠ|mohangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:mohangĂŠjĂŠ|mohangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:mohangĂŠshĂŠ|mohangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:mohangĂŠkĂŠ|mohangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mohangathatha|mohangathatha]] || [[word:mohangajaja|mohangajaja]] || [[word:mohangashasha|mohangashasha]] || [[word:mohangakaka|mohangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mohangatha|mohangatha]] || [[word:mohangaja|mohangaja]] || [[word:mohangasha|mohangasha]] || [[word:mohangaka|mohangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mohangafthaf|mohangafthaf]] || [[word:mohangafjaf|mohangafjaf]] || [[word:mohangafshaf|mohangafshaf]] || [[word:mohangafkaf|mohangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:mohangasha|mohangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohangshĂ«sha|mohangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohangrosha|mohangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohangmusha|mohangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohangyasha|mohangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohangnkshĂ«sha|gomohangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohangnkrosha|gomohangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohangnkmusha|gomohangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohangnkyasha|gomohangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:mohahangasha|mohahangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohahangshĂ«sha|mohahangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohahangrosha|mohahangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohahangmusha|mohahangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohahangyasha|mohahangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohahangnkshĂ«sha|gomohahangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohahangnkrosha|gomohahangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohahangnkmusha|gomohahangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohahangnkyasha|gomohahangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:mehĂŠngasha|mehĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mehĂŠngshĂ«sha|mehĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mehĂŠngrosha|mehĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mehĂŠngmusha|mehĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mehĂŠngyasha|mehĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomehĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gomehĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomehĂŠngnkrosha|gomehĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomehĂŠngnkmusha|gomehĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomehĂŠngnkyasha|gomehĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:mohfangasha|mohfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:mohfangshĂ«sha|mohfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:mohfangrosha|mohfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:mohfangmusha|mohfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:mohfangyasha|mohfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomohfangnkshĂ«sha|gomohfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomohfangnkrosha|gomohfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomohfangnkmusha|gomohfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomohfangnkyasha|gomohfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
